rubric.evidence: conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): loads-clean=pass, calls-real-inference=pass. Inference path (tiled image-to-image pipeline in worker.js) UNCHANGED by the retrofit. screenshots: scratchpad/verify-screens/swin-*.png
rubric.notes: Retrofit changed only I/O plumbing (input read + output composite), not the model call.

rubric.evidence: io-shape-semantic=manual (image-to-image → 2× upscaled image). Composite pixel-equality proven: measure-swin harness reports pixelDiffCount=0 between the old main-thread putImageData output and the new worker-composited ImageBitmap at 2048×1536; worker sharpness 19.09 == main sharpness 19.09.
rubric.notes: Same upscaled image + same sharpness numbers before/after the retrofit.

rubric.evidence: declares-model-id/task/backend/quantisation=pass; inference-off-main-thread=pass (new Worker). At-a-glance Web APIs row now also names OffscreenCanvas/ImageBitmap (input read + composite off main).

shared-auto-init-loader=pass; auto-init-on-cached=manual. Fresh-profile verify: loader shows honest absent state 'Download model (~150 MB)' + '0 MB cached of 10737 MB', run disabled — createModelLoader auto-init policy UNCHANGED. screenshots: scratchpad/verify-screens/swin-basics-mobile-light.png

live-status-region=pass, errors-on-the-page=pass, honest-progress-retry-offline=manual, runs-without-webgpu-fallback=manual. verify: 0 console errors, 0 failed network requests across top/basics/practical/wild.
controls-operable=manual. Tile-size select, Upscale button, wipe slider, sample strip, dropzone all preserved (identity unchanged); run button correctly gated on loader ready.
no-fake-output=manual. Output is the real tiled Swin2SR result rasterised in-worker; the 'before' layer is a real bicubic ×2 of the same input. No canned result.
images-have-alt=pass, buttons-have-names=pass. Compare slider keeps aria-valuetext; no control semantics changed by the retrofit.

responsive-desktop=pass, responsive-mobile=pass, parity-both-classes=manual. verify (DESKTOP 1280×800 + MOBILE 360×740 DPR3, light+dark): overflowDesktop=0px overflowMobile=0px on top/basics/wild. Layout/CSS untouched.

dense-composite-off-main-thread=pass (source: transferToImageBitmap). MEASURED at 2048×1536 (PerformanceObserver('longtask') + MessageChannel stall probe, headless Chrome): BEFORE the composite ran ~52ms on the main thread as ONE 52ms long task (bicubic baseline + putImageData + two sharpness passes on main); AFTER the worker builds the upscaled image + bicubic baseline via OffscreenCanvas.transferToImageBitmap and computes sharpness off-thread, the page only does drawImage = ~2.3ms with ZERO long tasks. INPUT read also moved off main (transferred ImageBitmap → worker OffscreenCanvas, not getImageData on the page).
rubric.notes: Composite main-thread cost 52ms → 2.3ms; crosses the 8ms frame slice before, well under it after.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Heavy synchronous processing / long loops block the main thread; move them off-thread or yield so input + rendering stay responsive.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the dense output composite (rasterise upscaled RGBA, build bicubic baseline, two sharpness passes) and the input pixel read were moved entirely into the Web Worker; results return as transferred ImageBitmaps so the main thread runs no per-pixel loop (no yielding needed — the work is off-thread).
guidanceConsulted.evidence: measure-swin: one 52ms main-thread long task before → 0 long tasks + 2.3ms drawImage after (2048×1536).

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Measure INP / long tasks with real APIs (Long Animation Frames / Event Timing); don't infer responsiveness from 'uses a worker'.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — measured before/after with PerformanceObserver('longtask') + a MessageChannel main-thread stall probe on a 2048×1536 input, capturing the composite's real main-thread ms rather than assuming.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: scratchpad/measure.mjs output retained; before 52ms long task, after none.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page navigation.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — @view-transition navigation:auto in public/styles.css (invariant 6); untouched by this retrofit.

openQuestions: End-to-end real-inference visual diff on a large photo (model download required) — composite equality is proven synthetically (pixelDiffCount=0); a full on-device A/B would further confirm.
Are all controls keyboard-operable with visible focus on both classes (manual)?

followUpGoals.goal: Agent matrix pass: Read the mobile+desktop screenshots, confirm real output + tap targets + focus, then flip support to ok in models.json.

summary: Revision-1 critique for swin2sr-super-resolution recording the off-main-thread dense-output-composite retrofit (invariant 15): input read + upscaled/bicubic composite + sharpness moved into the worker, transferred back as ImageBitmaps. Measured composite main-thread cost 52ms → 2.3ms with 0 long tasks after; output pixel-identical (diff 0). Route/slug/identity/controls preserved (in-place fix). Auto-init/download policy unchanged.
